title: Penalty
doc_html:
§689.  Penalty

Whoever violates any provision of this Part shall be fined not less than twenty-five dollars nor more than five hundred dollars.  Each day that conditions or actions in violation of this Part continue constitutes a separate and distinct offense.
doc_text:
§689.  Penalty
Whoever violates any provision of this Part shall be fined not less than twenty-five dollars nor more than five hundred dollars.  Each day that conditions or actions in violation of this Part continue constitutes a separate and distinct offense.
